content:
Hi Jordan

The bug is already fixed and will be included in the next release (v17).

See the below for more info. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues/10494
creator: platform34

content:
Thunderbird for Android doesn't have any calendar or extension support.

Calendar support is a highly requested feature. You can vote for this on Mozilla connect linked below, or add your own ideas.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/calendar-support-on-thunderbird-mobile/idi-p/76394
creator: platform34
